title: 東京大賞典の後に・三千年の願い

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: (Deep inside of me, there is a wish!)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(It's small, but it has remained fervent and
unchanged over feng shui's 3,000 years of
history! And that wish is...)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(Happiness! The desire to make today just a little
brighter than yesterday! And I'm going to show
that anyone can make that wish come true!)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(Faster than anyone! Stronger than anyone! Until I
reach the peak of the heavens themselves!)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: RAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The Yellow Dragon... soars toward the heavens.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She doesn't just win, she seizes an overwhelming
victory. Copano Rickey reigns supreme in the
Tokyo Daishoten.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Huff, pant, huff, pant... Rickey.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Well, Tarumae? Were you watching? This is the
true power of feng shui.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Getting the fans fired up, propping up your
friends, and then rising above it all and seizing
victory.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Do you get it now, everyone? With enough effort, anyone—and I mean anyone...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
...can find happiness! When you've lost your way,
feng shui will give you the courage to keep going!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Today, what the fans witnessed was hope.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The promise that those who stay true to their
path, bringing harmony to their surroundings, will
be smiled upon by the heavens.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A promise made by a 3,000-year old philosophy,
and proven by the racer who believes in it.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Rickey... Isn't that just your natural ability? I don't
know about it being because of feng shui...

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Oh! ♪ Rickey, Tarumae, doesn't this make you so
happy?

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
How nice it is to enjoy such an exciting
end-of-year race while surrounded by so many
fans.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
It's been a while since I've felt so warm and fuzzy
inside. I have to thank you, Rickey.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
I was feeling a little down, you know? Many of
the racers I debuted with have been gradually
leaving the scene.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: But with you two here, I can keep having fun.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Yeah! With everything in harmony, we have to keep running together. What do you say, Tarumae?

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Definitely. I'm not sure I'm convinced about the
power of feng shui...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: But I believe in the power you have, Rickey. Me, Acute, your fans—you've made us all smile a little brighter.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hokko Tarumae gives the greatest praise she can
give. With this, Copano Rickey has ascended
from being one of the Four Guardians to
something even greater.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
This isn't the end, Rickey. We still haven't settled
things.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Next year, I'll become even stronger! And to do
that...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to take my running to the next level—in
Dubai!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Huh? Dubai? Tarumae...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I don't like being so far from home, but I won't
keep letting myself settle for last place.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I'll eat well, stay hydrated, and be in top form for
next time!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I might have lost to you today, but I'll do my best
in Dubai, and catch right up to you!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I'll beat the power of feng shui with the power of
Tomakomai! Next time we meet, I'll be the winner!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Tarumae... You've truly overcome your past now,
haven't you?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: All right! Let's race again together next year! ♪
choice_data_list:
Looks like the Four Guardians are back in
balance.

Looks like the Four Guardians are back in
balance.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I thought I'd broken ahead this time, but I
just can't seem to shake them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Copano Rickey is improving, so are
those around her. Their relationship is one of
harmony, through and through.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Still, I'm always gonna be a step ahead. ☆ That's
what I want, and that's what I know I can do!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Heaven gave us a mandate, Trainer, and that's to
keep inspiring hope in people with feng shui!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
You'll continue to help me spread happiness,
won't you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is Copano Rickey's lucky road—a singular
twinkling path she'll travel down for the rest of
her lifetime.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Everyone! Balance your qi, never lose hope, and
continue straight down the path you choose. ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Rickey! ☆ Lucky! ☆ Super happy! ☆
